answers: Wearable tech: smartwatches, fitness trackers, smart glasses, hearables. Track health, notifications, and more on your body.
Smartwatch vs tracker: smartwatch does more (apps, calls, payments), tracker focuses on fitness. Apple Watch, Galaxy Watch, Fitbit.
Wearable trends: health monitoring (ECG, SpO2, blood pressure), AR glasses, smart rings, and advanced sleep tracking.
Popular wearables: Apple Watch (best ecosystem), Garmin (best fitness), Samsung Galaxy Watch (best Android), Fitbit (budget fitness).
